title: Enkeltført
description: AI-native accounting platform for Norwegian sole proprietorships. Automates bookkeeping with AI at the core.
longDescription: AI-native accounting for Norwegian enkeltpersonforetak. Built around AI agents that classify transactions, draft entries, and surface insights. Bookkeeping is automated, not assisted.
highlights: AI agents at the core of bookkeeping
Built for Norwegian sole proprietorships
Modern Bun + TypeScript stack

title: henteplan.no
description: Open API for Norwegian waste collection schedules: 13 providers, 265+ municipalities, with a self-healing Claude Code CI pipeline that repairs scrapers automatically.
longDescription: Aggregates waste-collection schedules across 13 providers and 265+ Norwegian municipalities into a single open API. The CI pipeline uses Claude Code as an AI agent to detect and repair broken scrapers without human intervention.
highlights: Self-healing scraper CI: a Claude Code agent repairs broken scrapers automatically
13 providers, 265+ municipalities
Open API for civic-tech use

title: devme.sh
description: Open-source Rust CLI that goes from git clone to a running dev environment in one command, with an AI-agent skill for Claude Code, Cursor and Codex.
longDescription: devme.sh is an open-source Rust CLI that takes a project from git clone to a running dev environment in a single command. It ships an AI-agent skill so coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex can set up and repair dev environments on their own.
highlights: git clone to a running dev environment in one command
AI-agent skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex
Open source, written in Rust

title: Partichat
description: Featured in Kode24. A multi-party political Q&A chat providing neutral, side-by-side answers from Norwegian political parties based on their official programs.
longDescription: Featured in Kode24, Norway's biggest developer news publication. An advanced political Q&A application that allows users to select multiple Norwegian political parties and get grounded answers based strictly on official party programs. Features RAG-powered responses with pgvector similarity search, citation tracking with page numbers, streaming responses, and multi-party comparison summaries. All responses are in Norwegian Bokmål and strictly grounded in official party program documents.
highlights: Featured in Kode24, Norway's biggest developer news publication
RAG-powered answers with pgvector similarity search
Multi-party comparison with transparent citations
Streaming responses for real-time answer generation
PDF text extraction with chunking for optimal retrieval
Norwegian Bokmål responses grounded in party programs

title: Sambu
description: Widget-based dashboard for Norwegian shared housing (kollektiv): chores, shopping lists, bus times, and electricity prices on one drag-and-drop home screen.
longDescription: Sambu is a customizable, widget-based dashboard for students and young adults living in Norwegian kollektiv. Each household gets a drag-and-drop grid (react-grid-layout) of self-contained widgets that adapt from phone to TV/kiosk. Widgets pull real data from real sources: live departures from Entur, hourly spot prices from hvakosterstrommen.no, and municipal waste-collection schedules. Chores support rotation, manual, and voluntary assignment; the shared shopping list syncs in real time with optimistic updates across every housemate's device. Built as a Bun + Turborepo monorepo with a type-safe tRPC API, Drizzle/PostgreSQL, and BetterAuth, where each widget ships its own router and schema behind a single registry contract.
highlights: Drag-and-drop widget dashboard, responsive from phone to TV/kiosk
Real integrations: Entur bus departures, hvakosterstrommen.no spot prices, municipal waste schedules
Chores with rotation, manual, and voluntary assignment modes
Shared shopping list with real-time optimistic sync across devices
Pluggable widget contract: each widget ships its own tRPC router and Drizzle schema
Type-safe Bun + Turborepo monorepo with tRPC, Drizzle, and BetterAuth

title: Voice Cloner
description: Clone any voice through three input modes: URL (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram), file upload, or microphone recording using advanced AI voice synthesis.
longDescription: An advanced voice cloning application that supports multiple input methods. Clone voices from social media URLs (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram), upload audio files directly, or record through your microphone. Uses Dia TTS technology for high-quality voice synthesis with real-time processing and cloud deployment capabilities.
highlights: Three input modes: URL, file upload, microphone
Support for YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram URLs
Real-time voice cloning with Dia TTS
Responsive web interface built with HTMX
Docker deployment ready for cloud (Google Cloud Run)

title: Samfundet Medlemskort
description: Create, crop, and print membership card photos with exact dimensions. Upload a photo, crop to the required ratio, and export a ready-to-print A4 sheet or PDF.
longDescription: A specialized tool for creating membership card photos with precise 25mm by 30mm dimensions. Features drag and drop upload, enforced 2.5:3 crop ratio, live print preview with cutting guidelines, and one-click PDF export.
highlights: Exact sizing: 25mm by 30mm per photo on A4
Drag and drop upload with enforced crop ratio
Live print preview with precise mm sizing
One-click PDF export functionality
Accessible, responsive UI with light/dark theme
